text: ALERT: The only legitimate IDWeek sites are IDWeek. org and IDWeekInternational. com for international groups. Registration and housing are completed using Maritz Global Events. IDWeek cannot guarantee your registration or housing if you purchase using an illegitimate website. Members of IDSA, SHEA, PIDS and HIVMA can now register for Week 2026! Whether you join us in Washington, D.
C, , or attend virtually, save your spot at reduced member rates and celebrate the latest breakthroughs in ID alongside thousands of your colleagues.
